name: Trust Gate
description: Trust-tier enforcement, inline Gate evaluation, untrusted-content encoding, automatic memory recall, and tool gating for OpenClaw deployments with mixed-trust interlocutors.

identityPath.description: Path to identity files (principal.json, friends.json) relative to workspace

memoryPath.description: Path to per-interlocutor memory files relative to workspace

gatePath.description: Path to Gate rules, templates, and adversarial suite relative to workspace

recallBudgetTokens.description: Max tokens of recalled memory to inject per message (Layer 1)

gateTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for inline Haiku Gate API call in milliseconds

gateModel.description: Model to use for inline Gate evaluation

layer2Enabled.description: Enable cross-domain memory search (Layer 2 recall) — Phase 1B+

consecutiveFailureThreshold.description: Consecutive Gate API failures before an escalation log is emitted. Notify-to-principal path is planned for a future release; v0.1.0 logs only.
